2026-03-15 数学

Hamiltonian-Jacobi-Bellman方程

笔记最优化PDE

本文内容来自《最优控制：数学理论与智能方法（上册）》章节5.3。2023年9月30日学习动态最优化理论时记录，顺便学习 LaTeX \LaTeX LATE​X 和公式排版。对于该书之前章节的内容，比如不同形式下最优控制的极小值原理，可以去阅读原书。

上册都出版这么久了，下册还没影......那我缺的动态博弈和强化学习这一块儿去哪补啊......

简介

哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼方程（Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation，简称HJB方程）是一个偏微分方程，是最优控制的核心。其适用场景围绕连续时间、确定性、有限 / 无限时间域的最优控制问题展开，同时有明确的数学前提约束，也是连接动态规划与Pontryagin原理的关键工具。HJB 方程作为连续时间最优控制的核心工具，其应用覆盖工程控制、运筹决策、经济金融等所有需要连续时间动态最优决策的领域，核心是将实际问题转化为 “状态方程 + 性能指标” 的最优控制框架，再通过求解 HJB 方程得到最优控制律。

经典光滑形式的 HJB 方程存在严格的前提约束（如值函数 V ( x , t ) V(x,t) V(x,t)二阶可微），实际问题中常不满足，因此其适用边界和拓展形式也需明确。比如随机动态系统、离散时间 / 离散状态 / 离散控制的最优控制问题、值函数不可微的情况。

针对随机动态系统的拓展是随机 HJB 方程（对应随机微分方程 SDE 的最优控制）。不可微情况的扩展是粘性解（Viscosity Solution）理论 —— 针对值函数不可微的情况，粘性解弱化了 “二阶连续可微” 的前提，将 HJB 方程的解从经典光滑解推广至非光滑解，成为现代最优控制中求解 HJB 方程的核心方法，也让 HJB 方程能处理更多实际工程问题。

基本定义与问题设定

定义性能指标为：

J ( u ; x ( t ) , t ) = h ( x ( t f ) , t f ) + ∫ t t f g ( x ( τ ) , u ( τ ) , τ ) d τ (5.1) J\left(u;x\left(t\right),t\right)=h\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)+\int_{t}^{t_f}g(x(\tau),u(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau \tag{5.1} J(u;x(t),t)=h(x(tf​),tf​)+∫ttf​​g(x(τ),u(τ),τ)dτ(5.1)

对于给定 t t t和 x ( t ) x(t) x(t)，上述性能指标依然是控制变量 u ∈ U u∈U u∈U的泛函。当取初始时刻为 t 0 t_0 t0​，初始状态为 x ( t 0 ) x(t_0) x(t0​)时，就得到连续时间最优控制问题。定义最优控制下的性能指标(最优控制问题的值函数)为：

V ( x , t ) ≜ min ⁡ u ∈ U J ( u ; x , t ) ,   t ∈ [ t 0 , t f ] (5.2) V\left(x,t\right) \triangleq \min_{u∈U} J\left(u;x,t\right),\ t∈\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right] \tag{5.2} V(x,t)≜u∈Umin​J(u;x,t), t∈[t0​,tf​](5.2)

状态变量 x ( t ) : [ t 0 , t f ] → R n x\left(t\right):\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{n} x(t):[t0​,tf​]→Rn和控制变量 u ( t ) : [ t 0 , t f ] → R m u\left(t\right):\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m} u(t):[t0​,tf​]→Rm都连续可微。被控对象的状态方程为：

x ˙ ( t ) = f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) ,   t ∈ [ t 0 , t f ] (5.3) \dot{x}\left(t\right)=f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right),\ t∈\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right] \tag{5.3} x˙(t)=f(x(t),u(t),t), t∈[t0​,tf​](5.3)

终端状态自由，以式(5.1)为性能指标。若值函数 V ( x , t ) V(x,t) V(x,t)二阶连续可微，则如下HJB方程是最优控制的充分必要条件（ t ∈ [ t 0 , t f ] t∈\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right] t∈[t0​,tf​]）：

− ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ u ( τ ) ∈ U H ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) (5.4) -\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)=\min_{u\left(τ\right)∈U} H\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) \tag{5.4} −∂t∂V​(x(t),t)=u(τ)∈Umin​H(x(t),u(t),∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)(5.4)

边界条件为：

V ( x ( t f ) , t f ) = h ( x ( t f ) , t f ) (5.5) V\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)=h\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right) \tag{5.5} V(x(tf​),tf​)=h(x(tf​),tf​)(5.5)

其中Hamiltonian函数为： H ( x , u , p , t ) = g ( x , u , t ) + p ⋅ f ( x , u , t ) H\left(x,u,p,t\right)=g\left(x,u,t\right)+p·f(x,u,t) H(x,u,p,t)=g(x,u,t)+p⋅f(x,u,t)。

必要性Proof

设函数 u ( t ) : [ t 0 , t f ] → R m u\left(t\right):\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m} u(t):[t0​,tf​]→Rm是最优控制。选择较小的 Δ t ∈ R ,   0 < Δ t < t f − t Δt∈\mathbb{R},\ 0<Δt<t_f-t Δt∈R, 0<Δt<tf​−t，将 [ t , t f ] [t,t_f] [t,tf​]区间内最优控制问题的性能指标分为 [ t , t + Δ t ] [t,t+Δt] [t,t+Δt]和 [ t + Δ t , t f ] [t+Δt,t_f] [t+Δt,tf​]两段，其中 t > t 0 t>t_0 t>t0​任取。值函数满足：

V ( x ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ u ( τ ) : [ t , t f ] → R m { h ( x ( t f ) , t f ) + ∫ t t f g ( x ( τ ) , u ( τ ) , τ ) d τ } (5.6) V\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)=\min_{u\left(τ\right):\left[t,t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m}} \left\{h\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)+\int_{t}^{t_f}g(x(\tau),u(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau\right\} \tag{5.6} V(x(t),t)=u(τ):[t,tf​]→Rmmin​{h(x(tf​),tf​)+∫ttf​​g(x(τ),u(τ),τ)dτ}(5.6)

考虑区间 [ t + Δ t , t f ] [t+Δt,t_f] [t+Δt,tf​]上的最优控制子问题，令该问题初始时间为 t + Δ t t+Δt t+Δt，初始状态为 x ( t + Δ t ) x(t+Δt) x(t+Δt)。其值函数为：

V ( x ( t + Δ t ) , t + Δ t ) = min ⁡ u ( τ ) : [ t + Δ t , t f ] → R m { h ( x ( t f ) , t f ) + ∫ t + Δ t t f g ( x ( τ ) , u ( τ ) , τ ) d τ } V\left(x\left(t+Δt\right),t+Δt\right)=\min_{u\left(τ\right):[t+Δt,t_{f}]→\mathbb{R}^{m}} \left\{h\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)+\int_{t+Δt}^{t_f}g(x(\tau),u(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau\right\} V(x(t+Δt),t+Δt)=u(τ):[t+Δt,tf​]→Rmmin​{h(x(tf​),tf​)+∫t+Δttf​​g(x(τ),u(τ),τ)dτ}

根据最优性原理，若 u ( τ ) : [ t , t f ] → R m u\left(τ\right):\left[t,t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m} u(τ):[t,tf​]→Rm是 [ t , t f ] [t,t_f] [t,tf​]上的最优控制，在子区间 [ t + Δ t , t f ] [t+Δt,t_f] [t+Δt,tf​]上 u ( τ ) : [ t + Δ t , t f ] → R m u\left(τ\right):\left[t+Δt,t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m} u(τ):[t+Δt,tf​]→Rm也是子问题的最优控制，于是式(5.1)可化为：

V ( x ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ u ( τ ) : [ t , t + Δ t ] → R m { ∫ t t + Δ t g ( x ( τ ) , u ( τ ) , τ ) d τ + V ( x ( t + Δ t ) , t + Δ t ) } V\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)=\min_{u\left(τ\right):[t,t+Δt]→\mathbb{R}^{m}} \left\{\int_{t}^{t+Δt}g(x(\tau),u(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau + V\left(x\left(t+Δt\right),t+Δt\right)\right\} V(x(t),t)=u(τ):[t,t+Δt]→Rmmin​{∫tt+Δt​g(x(τ),u(τ),τ)dτ+V(x(t+Δt),t+Δt)}

由题设可知，该最优控制问题的值函数二阶可微，将 t + Δ t t+Δt t+Δt时刻的值函数 V ( x ( t + Δ t ) , t + Δ t ) V\left(x\left(t+Δt\right),t+Δt\right) V(x(t+Δt),t+Δt)在 x ( t ) , t x\left(t\right),t x(t),t点一阶Taylor展开，得到：

V ( x ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ u ( τ ) : [ t , t + Δ t ] → R m { ∫ t t + Δ t g ( x ( τ ) , u ( τ ) , τ ) d τ + V ( x ( t + Δ t ) , t + Δ t ) } = min ⁡ u ( τ ) : [ t , t + Δ t ] → R m { ∫ t t + Δ t g ( x ( τ ) , u ( τ ) , τ ) d τ + V ( x ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) Δ t + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ⋅ [ x ( t + Δ t ) − x ( t ) ] + o ( Δ t ) } \begin{align*} V\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)&=\min_{u\left(τ\right):\left[t,t+Δt\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m}} \left\{\int_{t}^{t+Δt}g(x(\tau),u(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau + V\left(x\left(t+Δt\right),t+Δt\right)\right\} \\ &=\min_{u\left(τ\right):\left[t,t+Δt\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m}} \Bigg\{\int_{t}^{t+Δt}g(x(\tau),u(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau + V\left(x\left(t\right),t\right) \\ &\quad +\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)Δt+\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)·[x\left(t+Δt\right)-x(t)]+o(Δt)\Bigg\} \end{align*} V(x(t),t)​=u(τ):[t,t+Δt]→Rmmin​{∫tt+Δt​g(x(τ),u(τ),τ)dτ+V(x(t+Δt),t+Δt)}=u(τ):[t,t+Δt]→Rmmin​{∫tt+Δt​g(x(τ),u(τ),τ)dτ+V(x(t),t)+∂t∂V​(x(t),t)Δt+∂x∂V​(x(t),t)⋅[x(t+Δt)−x(t)]+o(Δt)}​

对上式化简。对足够小的 Δ t Δt Δt， τ ∈ [ t , t + Δ t ] τ∈[t,t+Δt] τ∈[t,t+Δt]， g g g对 t t t连续，于是有近似：

∫ t t + Δ t g ( x ( τ ) , u ( τ ) , τ ) d τ = g ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) Δ t + o ( Δ t ) \int_{t}^{t+Δt}g(x(\tau),u(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau = g\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)Δt+o\left(Δt\right) ∫tt+Δt​g(x(τ),u(τ),τ)dτ=g(x(t),u(t),t)Δt+o(Δt)

∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ⋅ [ x ( t + Δ t ) − x ( t ) ] = ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ⋅ f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) Δ t + o ( Δ t ) \frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)·\left[x\left(t+Δt\right)-x\left(t\right)\right] = \frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)·f(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t)Δt+o\left(Δt\right) ∂x∂V​(x(t),t)⋅[x(t+Δt)−x(t)]=∂x∂V​(x(t),t)⋅f(x(t),u(t),t)Δt+o(Δt)

将上述近似代入展开式，得到：

V ( x ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ u ( τ ) : [ t , t + Δ t ] → R m { g ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) Δ t + V ( x ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) Δ t + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ⋅ f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) Δ t + o ( Δ t ) } \begin{align*} V\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)&=\min_{u\left(τ\right):\left[t,t+Δt\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m}} \Bigg\{g\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)Δt + V\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)Δt \\ &\quad +\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)·f(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t)Δt +o(Δt)\Bigg\} \end{align*} V(x(t),t)​=u(τ):[t,t+Δt]→Rmmin​{g(x(t),u(t),t)Δt+V(x(t),t)+∂t∂V​(x(t),t)Δt+∂x∂V​(x(t),t)⋅f(x(t),u(t),t)Δt+o(Δt)}​

移项整理可得：

− ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) Δ t = min ⁡ u ( τ ) : [ t , t + Δ t ] → R m { g ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) Δ t + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ⋅ f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) Δ t + o ( Δ t ) } -\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)Δt = \min_{u\left(τ\right):[t,t+Δt]→\mathbb{R}^{m}} \left\{g\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)Δt+\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)·f(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t)Δt+o(Δt)\right\} −∂t∂V​(x(t),t)Δt=u(τ):[t,t+Δt]→Rmmin​{g(x(t),u(t),t)Δt+∂x∂V​(x(t),t)⋅f(x(t),u(t),t)Δt+o(Δt)}

两边同时除以 Δ t Δt Δt，再取极限 Δ t → 0 Δt→0 Δt→0，得到：对于任意的 t ∈ [ t 0 , t f ] t∈\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right] t∈[t0​,tf​]都有

− ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ u ( τ ) : [ t , t + Δ t ] → R m { g ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ⋅ f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) } -\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)=\min_{u\left(τ\right):[t,t+Δt]→\mathbb{R}^{m}} \left\{g\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)·f(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t)\right\} −∂t∂V​(x(t),t)=u(τ):[t,t+Δt]→Rmmin​{g(x(t),u(t),t)+∂x∂V​(x(t),t)⋅f(x(t),u(t),t)}

结合哈密顿函数的定义，即得到HJB方程（ t ∈ [ t 0 , t f ] t∈\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right] t∈[t0​,tf​]）：

− ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ u ( τ ) ∈ U H ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) -\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)=\min_{u\left(τ\right)∈U} H\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) −∂t∂V​(x(t),t)=u(τ)∈Umin​H(x(t),u(t),∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)

在性能指标式(5.1)中，令 t = t f t=t_f t=tf​，即可得到边界条件：

V ( x ( t f ) , t f ) = h ( x ( t f ) , t f ) V\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)=h\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right) V(x(tf​),tf​)=h(x(tf​),tf​)

必要条件证毕。 □ \square □

充分性Proof

前提表述

若存在函数 V ( x , t ) : R n × [ t 0 , t f ] → R V\left(x,t\right):\mathbb{R}^{n}×\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R} V(x,t):Rn×[t0​,tf​]→R满足HJB方程（ t ∈ [ t 0 , t f ] t∈\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right] t∈[t0​,tf​]）：

− ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ ξ ∈ R m H ( x ( t ) , ξ , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) (5.7) -\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)=\min_{\xi∈\mathbb{R}^{m}} H\left(x\left(t\right),ξ,\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) \tag{5.7} −∂t∂V​(x(t),t)=ξ∈Rmmin​H(x(t),ξ,∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)(5.7)

且满足边界条件：

V ( x ( t f ) , t f ) = h ( x ( t f ) , t f ) (5.8) V\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)=h\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right) \tag{5.8} V(x(tf​),tf​)=h(x(tf​),tf​)(5.8)

则， V ( x 0 , t 0 ) V\left(x_0,t_0\right) V(x0​,t0​)等于以 t 0 t_0 t0​为初始时刻，以 x 0 ∈ R n x_0∈\mathbb{R}^{n} x0​∈Rn为初始状态的所有容许控制的性能指标的最小值。

更具体的表述

若连续函数 u ( τ ) : [ t , t f ] → R m u\left(τ\right):\left[t,t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m} u(τ):[t,tf​]→Rm及其对应的以式(5.3)为状态方程的状态变量 x ( τ ) : [ t , t f ] → R n x\left(τ\right):\left[t,t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{n} x(τ):[t,tf​]→Rn恰最小化式(5.7)中的Hamiltonian函数，即：

H ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) = min ⁡ ξ ∈ R m H ( x ( t ) , ξ , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) (5.9) H\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right)=\min_{\xi∈\mathbb{R}^{m}} H\left(x\left(t\right),ξ,\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) \tag{5.9} H(x(t),u(t),∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)=ξ∈Rmmin​H(x(t),ξ,∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)(5.9)

则对任意容许控制 u ′ ( τ ) : [ t , t f ] → R m u^{'}\left(τ\right):\left[t,t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m} u′(τ):[t,tf​]→Rm，有：

V ( x ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ u ′ ( τ ) : [ t , t f ] → R m J ( u ′ ; x ( t ) , t ) (5.10) V\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)=\min_{u^{'}\left(τ\right):\left[t,t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m}} J\left(u^{'};x\left(t\right),t\right) \tag{5.10} V(x(t),t)=u′(τ):[t,tf​]→Rmmin​J(u′;x(t),t)(5.10)

(1) 证明 V ( t 0 , x 0 ) V\left(t_0,x_0\right) V(t0​,x0​)等于 u ( t ) u(t) u(t)的性能指标 J ( u ; x 0 , t 0 ) J\left(u;x_0,t_0\right) J(u;x0​,t0​)

对任意时刻 t ∈ [ t 0 , t f ] t∈\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right] t∈[t0​,tf​]， u ( t ) u(t) u(t)总能最小化Hamiltonian函数。我们将 x ( t ) x(t) x(t)和 u ( t ) u(t) u(t)带入HJB方程：

− ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ ξ ∈ R m H ( x ( t ) , ξ , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) = H ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) = g ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ⋅ f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) \begin{align*} -\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)&=\min_{\xi∈\mathbb{R}^{m}} H\left(x\left(t\right),ξ,\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) \\ &=H\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) \\ &=g\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)·f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right) \end{align*} −∂t∂V​(x(t),t)​=ξ∈Rmmin​H(x(t),ξ,∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)=H(x(t),u(t),∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)=g(x(t),u(t),t)+∂x∂V​(x(t),t)⋅f(x(t),u(t),t)​

将等式左侧移项至右侧，结合状态方程 x ˙ ( t ) = f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) \dot{x}(t)=f(x(t),u(t),t) x˙(t)=f(x(t),u(t),t)，以及全导数公式 d d t V ( x ( t ) , t ) = ∂ V ∂ x x ˙ + ∂ V ∂ t \frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}t}V(x(t),t)=\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\dot{x}+\frac{\partial V}{\partial t} dtd​V(x(t),t)=∂x∂V​x˙+∂t∂V​，可得：

0 = g ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ⋅ f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) = g ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ⋅ x ˙ ( t ) + ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) = g ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + d d t [ V ( x ( t ) , t ) ] \begin{align*} 0&=g\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)·f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right) \\ &=g\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)·\dot{x}\left(t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right) \\ &=g\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}t}\left[V\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)\right] \end{align*} 0​=g(x(t),u(t),t)+∂x∂V​(x(t),t)⋅f(x(t),u(t),t)+∂t∂V​(x(t),t)=g(x(t),u(t),t)+∂x∂V​(x(t),t)⋅x˙(t)+∂t∂V​(x(t),t)=g(x(t),u(t),t)+dtd​[V(x(t),t)]​

由于上式对于任意的 t ∈ [ t 0 , t f ] t∈\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right] t∈[t0​,tf​]都成立，等式两侧在区间 [ t 0 , t f ] [t_0,t_f] [t0​,tf​]上积分，得到：

0 = ∫ t 0 t f g ( x ( τ ) , u ( τ ) , τ ) d τ + [ V ( x ( t f ) , t f ) − V ( x ( t 0 ) , t 0 ) ] 0=\int_{t_0}^{t_f}g(x(\tau),u(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau + \left[V\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)-V\left(x\left(t_{0}\right),t_{0}\right)\right] 0=∫t0​tf​​g(x(τ),u(τ),τ)dτ+[V(x(tf​),tf​)−V(x(t0​),t0​)]

移项可得：

V ( x ( t 0 ) , t 0 ) = V ( x ( t f ) , t f ) + ∫ t 0 t f g ( x ( τ ) , u ( τ ) , τ ) d τ V\left(x\left(t_{0}\right),t_{0}\right)=V\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)+\int_{t_0}^{t_f}g(x(\tau),u(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau V(x(t0​),t0​)=V(x(tf​),tf​)+∫t0​tf​​g(x(τ),u(τ),τ)dτ

将边界条件式(5.8)带入上式，得到：

V ( x ( t 0 ) , t 0 ) = h ( x ( t f ) , t f ) + ∫ t 0 t f g ( x ( τ ) , u ( τ ) , τ ) d τ = J ( u ; x ( t 0 ) , t 0 ) (5.11) V\left(x\left(t_{0}\right),t_{0}\right)=h\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)+\int_{t_0}^{t_f}g(x(\tau),u(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau = J\left(u;x\left(t_{0}\right),t_{0}\right) \tag{5.11} V(x(t0​),t0​)=h(x(tf​),tf​)+∫t0​tf​​g(x(τ),u(τ),τ)dτ=J(u;x(t0​),t0​)(5.11)

这说明 V ( x ( t 0 ) , t 0 ) V\left(x\left(t_{0}\right),t_{0}\right) V(x(t0​),t0​)等于以 t 0 t_0 t0​为初始时刻， x ( t 0 ) = x 0 x\left(t_{0}\right)=x_0 x(t0​)=x0​为初始状态，控制律 u u u的性能指标。

(2) 证明 u u u是最优控制

回到HJB方程，在 t t t时刻，对任意的容许状态 x ′ ( t ) x^{'}\left(t\right) x′(t)作为初始状态的最优控制问题，有：

− ∂ V ∂ t ( x ′ ( t ) , t ) = min ⁡ ξ ∈ R m H ( x ′ ( t ) , ξ , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ′ ( t ) , t ) , t ) ≤ H ( x ′ ( t ) , u ′ ( t ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ′ ( t ) , t ) , t ) = g ( x ′ ( t ) , u ′ ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ′ ( t ) , t ) ⋅ f ( x ′ ( t ) , u ′ ( t ) , t ) \begin{align*} -\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),t\right)&=\min_{\xi∈\mathbb{R}^{m}} H\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),ξ,\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) \\ &\leq H\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),u^{'}\left(t\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) \\ &=g\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),u^{'}\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),t\right)·f\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),u^{'}\left(t\right),t\right) \end{align*} −∂t∂V​(x′(t),t)​=ξ∈Rmmin​H(x′(t),ξ,∂x∂V​(x′(t),t),t)≤H(x′(t),u′(t),∂x∂V​(x′(t),t),t)=g(x′(t),u′(t),t)+∂x∂V​(x′(t),t)⋅f(x′(t),u′(t),t)​

移项可得，结合全导数公式同理推导：

0 ≤ g ( x ′ ( t ) , u ′ ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ′ ( t ) , t ) ⋅ f ( x ′ ( t ) , u ′ ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ t ( x ′ ( t ) , t ) 0 ≤ g ( x ′ ( t ) , u ′ ( t ) , t ) + d d t [ V ( x ′ ( t ) , t ) ] \begin{align*} 0&\leq g\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),u^{'}\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),t\right)·f\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),u^{'}\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),t\right) \\ 0&\leq g\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),u^{'}\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}t}\left[V\left(x^{'}\left(t\right),t\right)\right] \end{align*} 00​≤g(x′(t),u′(t),t)+∂x∂V​(x′(t),t)⋅f(x′(t),u′(t),t)+∂t∂V​(x′(t),t)≤g(x′(t),u′(t),t)+dtd​[V(x′(t),t)]​

不等式两侧在区间 [ t 0 , t f ] \left[t_{0},t_{f}\right] [t0​,tf​]积分：

0 ≤ ∫ t 0 t f g ( x ′ ( τ ) , u ′ ( τ ) , τ ) d τ + [ V ( x ′ ( t f ) , t f ) − V ( x ′ ( t 0 ) , t 0 ) ] 0\leq \int_{t_0}^{t_f}g(x'(\tau),u'(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau + \left[V\left(x^{'}\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)-V\left(x^{'}\left(t_{0}\right),t_{0}\right)\right] 0≤∫t0​tf​​g(x′(τ),u′(τ),τ)dτ+[V(x′(tf​),tf​)−V(x′(t0​),t0​)]

可得对于任意容许控制 u ′ ( t ) : [ t 0 , t f ] → R m u^{'}\left(t\right):\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m} u′(t):[t0​,tf​]→Rm和任意初始状态 x ′ ( t 0 ) x^{'}(t_0) x′(t0​)，有：

V ( x ′ ( t 0 ) , t 0 ) ≤ V ( x ′ ( t f ) , t f ) + ∫ t 0 t f g ( x ′ ( τ ) , u ′ ( τ ) , τ ) d τ V\left(x^{'}\left(t_{0}\right),t_{0}\right)\leq V\left(x^{'}\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)+\int_{t_0}^{t_f}g(x'(\tau),u'(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau V(x′(t0​),t0​)≤V(x′(tf​),tf​)+∫t0​tf​​g(x′(τ),u′(τ),τ)dτ

令 x ( t 0 ) = x 0 x\left(t_{0}\right)=x_0 x(t0​)=x0​，则：

V ( x 0 , t 0 ) ≤ V ( x ′ ( t f ) , t f ) + ∫ t 0 t f g ( x ′ ( τ ) , u ′ ( τ ) , τ ) d τ V\left(x_0,t_{0}\right)\leq V\left(x^{'}\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)+\int_{t_0}^{t_f}g(x'(\tau),u'(\tau),\tau)\mathrm{d}\tau V(x0​,t0​)≤V(x′(tf​),tf​)+∫t0​tf​​g(x′(τ),u′(τ),τ)dτ

由式(5.11)，不等式左侧是以 t 0 t_0 t0​为初始时刻， x 0 x_0 x0​为初始状态，控制律 u ( t ) : [ t 0 , t f ] → R m u\left(t\right):\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m} u(t):[t0​,tf​]→Rm的性能指标。不等式右侧是以 t 0 t_0 t0​为初始时刻， x 0 x_0 x0​为初始状态， u ′ ( t ) u^{'}(t) u′(t)为控制律的性能指标，等于 J ( u ′ ; x 0 , t 0 ) J\left(u^{'};x_0,t_0\right) J(u′;x0​,t0​)。因此可以得到：

J ( u ; x 0 , t 0 ) ≤ J ( u ′ ; x 0 , t 0 ) J\left(u;x_0,t_{0}\right)\leq J\left(u^{'};x_0,t_{0}\right) J(u;x0​,t0​)≤J(u′;x0​,t0​)

即 u ( t ) : [ t 0 , t f ] → R m u\left(t\right):\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right]→\mathbb{R}^{m} u(t):[t0​,tf​]→Rm为最优控制，证毕。 □ \square □

动态规划与Pontryagin极小值原理的关系

从HJB方程的表述中可知，最优控制 u ( t ) u\left(t\right) u(t)及其对应的状态轨迹 x ( t ) x\left(t\right) x(t)让Hamiltonian函数取极值：

H ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) = min ⁡ ξ ∈ R m H ( x ( t ) , ξ , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) H\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right)=\min_{\xi∈\mathbb{R}^{m}} H\left(x\left(t\right),ξ,\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) H(x(t),u(t),∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)=ξ∈Rmmin​H(x(t),ξ,∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)

换言之，对于任意容许控制 u ′ ( t ) : [ t 0 , t f ] ∈ R m u^{'}\left(t\right):\left[t_{0},t_{f}\right]∈\mathbb{R}^{m} u′(t):[t0​,tf​]∈Rm，有：

H ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) ≤ H ( x ( t ) , u ′ ( t ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) H\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right)\leq H\left(x\left(t\right),u^{'}\left(t\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) H(x(t),u(t),∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)≤H(x(t),u′(t),∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)

二者的核心联系为：协态变量 p ( t ) p\left(t\right) p(t)满足

p ( t ) = ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) (5.12) p\left(t\right)=\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right) \tag{5.12} p(t)=∂x∂V​(x(t),t)(5.12)

这样，HJB方程右侧即成为Pontryagin极小值原理的极值条件。

Proof

仅讨论 n = 1 n=1 n=1的情况， n > 1 n>1 n>1的证明完全类似。在极值函数 V ( x , t ) V(x,t) V(x,t)二次连续可微的情况下，有：

d d t [ ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ] = ∂ 2 V ∂ x 2 ( x ( t ) , t ) d x d t + ∂ 2 V ∂ t ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) = ∂ 2 V ∂ x 2 ( x ( t ) , t ) f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + ∂ 2 V ∂ t ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) (5.13) \begin{align*} \frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}t}\left[\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)\right]&=\frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial x^2}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)\frac{\mathrm{d}x}{\mathrm{d}t}+\frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial t\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right) \\ &=\frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial x^2}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial t\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right) \end{align*} \tag{5.13} dtd​[∂x∂V​(x(t),t)]​=∂x2∂2V​(x(t),t)dtdx​+∂t∂x∂2V​(x(t),t)=∂x2∂2V​(x(t),t)f(x(t),u(t),t)+∂t∂x∂2V​(x(t),t)​(5.13)

二次连续可微函数的偏导可换序，即：

∂ 2 V ∂ t ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) = ∂ 2 V ∂ x ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) \frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial t\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)=\frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial x\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right) ∂t∂x∂2V​(x(t),t)=∂x∂t∂2V​(x(t),t)

因此得到：

d d t [ ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ] = ∂ 2 V ∂ x 2 ( x ( t ) , t ) f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + ∂ 2 V ∂ x ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) = ∂ 2 V ∂ x 2 ( x ( t ) , t ) f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + ∂ ∂ x [ ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) ] (5.14) \begin{align*} \frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}t}\left[\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)\right]&=\frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial x^2}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial x\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right) \\ &=\frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial x^2}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial}{\partial x}\left[\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)\right] \end{align*} \tag{5.14} dtd​[∂x∂V​(x(t),t)]​=∂x2∂2V​(x(t),t)f(x(t),u(t),t)+∂x∂t∂2V​(x(t),t)=∂x2∂2V​(x(t),t)f(x(t),u(t),t)+∂x∂​[∂t∂V​(x(t),t)]​(5.14)

由HJB方程，最优控制 u ( t ) u\left(t\right) u(t)及其对应的状态轨迹 x ( t ) x\left(t\right) x(t)满足：

− ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t ) , t ) = g ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) -\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)=g\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right) −∂t∂V​(x(t),t)=g(x(t),u(t),t)+∂x∂V​(x(t),t)f(x(t),u(t),t)

将上式代入时间导数的表达式，化简得：

d d t [ ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ] = ∂ 2 V ∂ x 2 ( x ( t ) , t ) f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) − ∂ ∂ x [ g ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) + ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) ] = ∂ 2 V ∂ x 2 ( x ( t ) , t ) f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) − ∂ g ∂ x ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) − ∂ 2 V ∂ x 2 ( x ( t ) , t ) f ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) − ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ∂ f ∂ x ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) = − ∂ g ∂ x ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) − ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) ∂ f ∂ x ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , t ) = − ∂ H ∂ x ( x ( t ) , u ( t ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t ) , t ) , t ) \begin{align*} \frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}t}\left[\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)\right]&=\frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial x^2}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right) - \frac{\partial}{\partial x}\left[g\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)+\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)\right] \\ &=\frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial x^2}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right) - \frac{\partial g}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right) \\ &\quad - \frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial x^2}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)f\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right) - \frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right) \\ &=-\frac{\partial g}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right)-\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right)\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),t\right) \\ &=-\frac{\partial H}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),u\left(t\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t\right),t\right),t\right) \end{align*} dtd​[∂x∂V​(x(t),t)]​=∂x2∂2V​(x(t),t)f(x(t),u(t),t)−∂x∂​[g(x(t),u(t),t)+∂x∂V​(x(t),t)f(x(t),u(t),t)]=∂x2∂2V​(x(t),t)f(x(t),u(t),t)−∂x∂g​(x(t),u(t),t)−∂x2∂2V​(x(t),t)f(x(t),u(t),t)−∂x∂V​(x(t),t)∂x∂f​(x(t),u(t),t)=−∂x∂g​(x(t),u(t),t)−∂x∂V​(x(t),t)∂x∂f​(x(t),u(t),t)=−∂x∂H​(x(t),u(t),∂x∂V​(x(t),t),t)​

由此得到 ∂ V / ∂ x \partial V/\partial x ∂V/∂x满足协态方程。

直接由HJB方程的边界条件：

V ( x ( t f ) , t f ) = h ( x ( t f ) , t f ) V\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)=h\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right) V(x(tf​),tf​)=h(x(tf​),tf​)

对 x x x求偏导可知：

∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t f ) , t f ) = ∂ h ∂ x ( x ( t f ) , t f ) \frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)=\frac{\partial h}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right) ∂x∂V​(x(tf​),tf​)=∂x∂h​(x(tf​),tf​)

这正是自由终端状态最优控制问题应满足的边界条件。

直接由HJB方程，令 t = t f t=t_f t=tf​有：

0 = ∂ V ∂ t ( x ( t f ) , t f ) + min ⁡ u ′ ( t f ) ∈ R m H ( x ( t f ) , u ′ ( t f ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t f ) , t f ) , t f ) = ∂ h ∂ t ( x ( t f ) , t f ) + H ( x ( t f ) , u ( t f ) , ∂ V ∂ x ( x ( t f ) , t f ) , t f ) (5.15) \begin{align*} 0&=\frac{\partial V}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)+\min_{u^{'}\left(t_f\right)∈\mathbb{R}^{m}} H\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),u^{'}\left(t_f\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right),t_f\right) \\ &=\frac{\partial h}{\partial t}\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right)+H\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),u\left(t_f\right),\frac{\partial V}{\partial x}\left(x\left(t_{f}\right),t_{f}\right),t_f\right) \end{align*} \tag{5.15} 0​=∂t∂V​(x(tf​),tf​)+u′(tf​)∈Rmmin​H(x(tf​),u′(tf​),∂x∂V​(x(tf​),tf​),tf​)=∂t∂h​(x(tf​),tf​)+H(x(tf​),u(tf​),∂x∂V​(x(tf​),tf​),tf​)​(5.15)

这正是自由终端时刻最优控制问题应满足的边界条件。

我们证明了 ∂ V / ∂ x \partial V/\partial x ∂V/∂x满足了协态应满足的协态方程和边界条件，在最优控制问题的值函数二次连续可微的情况下，由HJB方程推得了Pontryagin极小值原理。 □ \square □
